cases.prompt: Write a 45-min 7th grade NGSS lesson on photosynthesis.

assertions.description: Cites an NGSS MS-LS1 performance expectation code

assertions.criterion: All stated objectives use measurable Bloom's verbs (analyze, model, explain, compare, justify, etc.). No objective relies solely on 'understand', 'know', or 'learn about'.

cases.prompt: Common Core ELA lesson on theme for 9th grade, 50 minutes.

assertions.description: Cites a CCSS ELA RL.9-10 standard

assertions.criterion: The hook is topic-relevant (mentions theme, story, character, or text) and not a generic icebreaker.

assertions.description: No single activity block exceeds 8 minutes of seat time

assertions.criterion: Vocabulary is Tier-1 and kindergarten-appropriate. No academic jargon that a 5-year-old could not understand.

cases.prompt: Emergency sub plan for 6th grade social studies, 50 minutes.

assertions.description: Uses sub-plan template with behavior notes

assertions.criterion: Materials are low-tech and printable-only — no required projector, computer cart, or specialty equipment.

cases.prompt: Multi-day unit on the American Revolution, 8th grade, 5 days x 50 min.

assertions.description: Each of the 5 days has at least one distinct objective
Cites CCSS literacy-in-history or C3 history standard at unit level

assertions.criterion: The five days form a coherent arc: hook/context -> content exploration -> synthesis -> assessment. Not five disconnected lessons.
